_comment: Seed data for the reservations MOCK backend (review: dummy data lives in a JSON file). Edit freely. Tenant keys are UPPERCASE (they match the resolved credential's tenant). Each slot has a capacity; a booking consumes one unit, so availability reflects bookings and the availability!=booked race can be exercised naturally (see the capacity-1 slot). Switchboard itself stays stateless — this is the MOCK standing in for OpenTable's state, and it resets to this seed on restart.
